v1.0.0.description: See repo readme for installation instructions.
v1.0.0.title: v1.0.0

v1.0.1.description:
- Will now default to wss for WebSocket connection and fall back to ws on failure.
- Sent item messages will now show text instead of numeric ids.
- Fixed the 5000 Yen Swimsuit Voucher 2 and Matsutake items having swapped item ids.
- Fixed an issue where the Wonderful Spray event could occur while in the Matsutake event.
- Fixed ultimate move tutors either not battling you or not giving their ultimate move check if you already unlocked the move.
- Goal completion will now be resent if it happens while offline.
- Fixed watching scenes in the gallery unlocking checks.
- Fixed extra shop locations not having mapped names.

v1.1.0.description:
- Added required levels for logic to all trainer battles.
- Added an option to adjust enemy trainer levels by a flat number.
- Added Yen in increments of 1000, 2000, 5000, and 10000 as junk items. 
- Added options to randomize Yarimon abilities and moves.
- Added an option to randomize wild Yarimon locations.
- Added an option to randomize enemy trainer Yarimon.
- Added an option to add progression blocking road pass items to the item pool. Each one gives access to the north, west, or south exit to Big City.
- Added an option to randomize trainer yen rewards.
- Added an option to change the amount of yen given by winning battles against trainers that give yen on defeat.
- Fixed seed check on reconnect.
- Fixed misc logic errors.
- Scene randomization now defaults off.
v1.1.0.title: v1.1.0

v1.1.1.description:
- Fixed Yarimon getting a non-damaging move as their first move when move randomization is turned on.
- Set explicit_indirect_conditions to false to fix multiworld generation unreachable locations.
v1.1.1.title: v1.1.1
